cards.back: A computer system that perceives its environment and acts upon it to achieve a goal or set of goals
A subset of artificial intelligence that involves training algorithms to make predictions or decisions based on data
A type of intelligent agent that uses a set of pre-defined rules to make decisions and take actions
A type of machine learning model inspired by the structure and function of the human brain, used for tasks such as image and speech recognition

cards.front: What is the difference between narrow AI and general AI?
cards.back: Narrow AI is designed to perform a specific task, whereas general AI is designed to perform any intellectual task that a human can
